description: Studied Front End Development at JENSEN YrkesHögskola in Gothenburg, Sweden.
Underwent studies in construction with specification in tiling. Education focused on preparing me for the job market with clients and teams alike.
Identified and corrected technical problems in WordPress which improved user experience and loading times.
Improved UI components and responsibility which improved user experience on all screen sizes.
Developed tailor-made solutions for specific client needs which improved delivery and functionality.
Developed a fullstack web application with React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS in an Agile team.
Designed and prototyped user interface in Figma with focus on user flow and UX.
Integrated frontend with REST API for effective and scalable data communication.
Developed a responsive landing page in Next.js based on Figma design with focus on mobile responsiveness and presentation.
Designed components and layout in Next.js based on Figma design.
Acted as Scrum Master and improved the team's delivery capability and sprint planning.
Worked as a tiler for a small company operating from Bollebygd.
Worked as a tiler for a small company operating from Gothenburg.
